description: Unit test class for MailjetEmailProvider, testing email sending functionality using Mockito and JUnit 5.

classes.name: MailjetEmailProviderTest
classes.description: Test suite for MailjetEmailProvider to verify email sending behavior.

methods.name: setUp
methods.description: Initializes test dependencies and the provider instance before each test.

methods.name: send_success
methods.description: Tests successful email sending via Mailjet, verifying HTTP request construction.

methods.name: send_throwsOnMissingCredentials
methods.description: Ensures an exception is thrown if provider.send() is called without proper credentials.
